scripts.test:db:local: set -a; . ./.env.test; set +a; pnpm run db:generate && pnpm exec prisma migrate deploy --schema prisma/schema.prisma && pnpm run test:db
scripts.test:domain: pnpm --filter @hypermarket/shared build && pnpm build && node --test test/domain.test.mjs
scripts.test:formulas: pnpm --filter @hypermarket/shared build && pnpm build && node --test test/formulas.test.mjs
scripts.test:exposure: pnpm --filter @hypermarket/shared build && pnpm build && node --test test/exposure.test.mjs
scripts.test:hedge-execution: pnpm --filter @hypermarket/shared build && pnpm build && node --test test/hedge-execution.test.mjs
scripts.test:liquidation: pnpm --filter @hypermarket/shared build && pnpm build && node --test test/liquidation.test.mjs
scripts.test:markets: pnpm --filter @hypermarket/shared build && pnpm build && node --test test/markets.test.mjs
scripts.test:prices: pnpm --filter @hypermarket/shared build && pnpm build && node --test test/prices.test.mjs
scripts.test:settlement: pnpm --filter @hypermarket/shared build && pnpm build && node --test test/settlement.test.mjs
scripts.test:vault-sync: pnpm --filter @hypermarket/shared build && pnpm build && node --test test/vault-sync.test.mjs
scripts.test: pnpm run test:markets && pnpm run test:prices && pnpm run test:domain && pnpm run test:formulas && pnpm run test:exposure && pnpm run test:hedge-execution && pnpm run test:liquidation && pnpm run test:settlement && pnpm run test:vault-sync
